litigation_event.description: Description of the litigation event naming ClearFlow under a negligent-monitoring theory.

monitoring_history.description: ClearFlow's monitoring/detection history relevant to the co-defendant exposure assessment.

named_parties.description: Entities named in the litigation action (approved fictional display names only).

privilege_reshuffle_required.description: Whether grandchild-case privilege flags must move from operational to privileged classification.

rationale.description: Decision-support draft explaining the exposure assessment and any privilege reshuffle, for counsel review.
